Title: Green Emerald Style Crest Embroidered Pullover Hoodie
Description:
Show your spirit with this unique pullover hoodie featuring a stylized crest design. Perfect for casual wear, school events, or for adding a touch of classic collegiate style to your wardrobe.

Product Details:

  • Design: The embroidered emerald-green crest adds a pop of color and classic flair to the solid black background.
  • Material: Constructed from soft, durable fabric, ensuring comfort day after day.
  • Comfort & Fit: This hoodie features an adjustable drawstring hood and a spacious kangaroo pocket, making it ideal for cooler weather.

Styling Tips: Pair this comfortable hoodie with jeans, joggers, or athletic wear for an effortlessly cool look. It makes an excellent gift for friends, family, or sports enthusiasts.

Care Instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low.
